create_issue.note: F&O is multi-company: writes must target a legal entity (dataAreaId). D365FO_COMPANY is the operator's chosen default company — confirm the ProjectTasks composite key shape against your environment's /data/$metadata.

delete_issue.note: Composite key shown is a reference mapping (dataAreaId + ProjectId + ProjectTaskId) — confirm the exact key segment names/order against your environment's /data/$metadata.

list_issues.note: ProjectTasks = the WBS/task lines under a project (the closest F&O analogue to an issue — there is no Jira-style backlog). cross-company=true so the read isn't scoped to one legal entity.

list_projects.note: ProjectsV2 is the OData entity set for the project header (data entity ProjProjectV2Entity, table ProjTable).

update_issue.note: Composite key shown is a reference mapping — confirm against your environment's /data/$metadata.

label: Microsoft Dynamics 365 Finance & Operations (Project Management and Accounting)
notes: NOT the same product as the sibling 'dynamics365' backend (Project Operations on Dataverse) — this is the classic Finance & Operations (F&O, formerly AX) Project Management and Accounting (PMA) module, reached over its own OData Web API, finance-first rather than task-first. Real, documented entities this binding maps (Microsoft Common Data Model schema + F&O OData docs): ProjectsV2 (OData set for the project header; data entity ProjProjectV2Entity, table ProjTable) -> project; ProjectTasks (WBS/task lines) -> issue. Financials are backed by ProjProposalCost (budget/estimate lines) for budget/plannedCost, ProjCostTrans (posted actual-cost transactions) for actualCost/costCategory, and F&O's standard financial dimensions (e.g. the CostCenter dimension) for costCenter; capex/opex fields reflect F&O's project capitalisation feature (investment/asset-related projects). PMA has no Jira-style backlog, EVM baseline, or RAID log, so those capabilities are honestly declared off — resource assignment exists in the product but has no entity confirmed here, so 'resources' is also off pending verification. Auth is Azure AD OAuth2 against the F&O environment's own app registration — configured as a generic n8n OAuth2 credential, NOT n8n's Dataverse-specific 'Microsoft Dynamics 365' credential (that one only reaches Dataverse/CRM, not F&O). D365FO_URL is the environment root, e.g. https://yourorg.operations.dynamics.com; D365FO_COMPANY is the legal entity (dataAreaId) writes are scoped to. CATALOGUED, NOT VERIFIED: every entity/field/composite-key name here is a reference mapping sourced from Microsoft's public Common Data Model schema docs and community references, not a live tenant — confirm every path against your own environment's /data/$metadata before relying on this as more than a catalogued starting point (see docs/vendors/DYNAMICS-365-FO.md).
via: HTTP (F&O OData v4 Web API) + Azure AD OAuth2 (generic n8n OAuth2 credential)
